calendar.matters:
Notice Of Application And Application For Order Establishing Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Gorski for and with Gary Parent. Sara Taylor for and with Suzanne Sarra (Petitioner).

Ms. Taylor stated that a van and a special bed was going to be purchased out the $100,000.00 which would reduce the coprus of the trust to $60,000.00 and that it would be costly to do accountings for a trust of that size. Mr. Parent stated to the Court that he understood that he was waiving his right to the accountings and that he had the right to request an accounting at any time in the future. In addition, Ms. Taylor stated that language had been added to the trust in regard to the allowance of fees and legitimate expenses to seek court approval if they exceeded more than $500.00 per year, to require court approval for amendments to the trust and changing of trustees, for borrowing of trust funds and for investment of the trust funds pusuant to Probate Code 2574. Mr. Gorski informed the Court that DHS had been paid and had received notice. Mr. Parent also stated that he understood that he was waiving the requirement of the bond and stated that he trusted his Sister and his Attorney. The matter was taken under submission for review of the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Jacqueline Chan CSR#10276. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Notice Of Application And Application For Order Establishing Special Needs Trust
